name: teammarhaba-capacitor
description: Capacitor host for the TeamMarhaba hybrid app — wraps the hosted web UI (https://teammarhaba.web.app) as an Android (and future iOS) native shell. The web app stays a no-build static SPA under web/src; Capacitor only adds the native bridge + plugin layer and loads the hosted site via server.url so web deploys keep flowing instantly (TM-278).
